BBC NewsBBC News - News Front Page https://www.bbc.co.uk/news https://news.bbcimg.co.uk/nol/shared/img/bbc_news_120x60.gif英国广播公司新闻https://www.bbc.co.uk/news节点的 RSS 2026 年 2 月 24 日星期二 14:48:50 GMT Copyright: (C) British Broadcasting Corporation, see https://www.bbc.co.uk/usingthebbc/terms-of-use/#15metadataandrssfeeds for terms and conditions of reuse.en-gb 15
Russian soldiers tell BBC they saw fellow troops executed on commanders' ordersFour men expose the horror and brutality of conditions in the Ukraine war, with two saying they saw soldiers being shot for refusing orders. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz7gw3l395ro?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz7gw3l395ro#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 06:02:13 GMT
'Anyone who runs is shot': Watch Russian soldiers describe killings of troops who refuse ordersThe men, who are on the run, told of the horrors they witnessed on the Russian side of the front lines in Ukraine. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cx2rql99rwxo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cx2rql99rwxo#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 07:32:54 GMT
Phillipson defends student loan change and says average repayments will rise by £8 a monthSome graduates in England say "punishing" student loan repayments have led them to cut their hours at work. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn0e2kkegg6o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn0e2kkegg6o#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 12:45:01 GMT
Nancy Guthrie's family offers $1m reward to bring home missing motherFighting back tears, the missing woman's NBC host daughter said they accept she "may be lost". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy4wd11j0evo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy4wd11j0evo#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 14:27:28 GMT
Chocolate kept in anti-theft boxes as shops warn it's being stolen to orderRetailers and police forces tell the BBC that thieves are targeting chocolate and selling it on. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce3gqr7p0lqo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce3gqr7p0lqo#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 10:39:39 GMT
First British baby born using transplanted womb from dead donor Grace Bell, who was born without a viable womb, says her little boy is "simply a miracle". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg53xp5857o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg53xp5857o#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 00:39:50 GMT
Hilary Duff pays tribute to Robert Carradine, after star of Lizzie McGuire dies age 71His family says the actor took his own life after living with bipolar disorder for nearly two decades. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy0dqpjjprno?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy0dqpjjprno#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 09:34:31 GMT
Labour MP Dawn Butler asks for 'urgent explanation' over racial slur during BBC's Baftas broadcastMP asks why racial slur was not removed from the Bafta Film Awards show when it was on a two-hour delay. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn712kvkreeo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn712kvkreeo#0 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 10:04:13 GMT
Bowen: Why Ukraine remains defiant and does not feel close to defeatThis month marks four gruelling years since the full‑scale invasion began and a genuine ceasefire still feels far from assured https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd9g2ggq4epo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd9g2ggq4epo#1 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 06:02:26 GMT
In maps: Tracking the war with RussiaHow Russia's gradual gains in the face of fierce Ukrainian opposition have affected the front line in recent months. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0l0k4389g2o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0l0k4389g2o#1 Tue, 24 Feb 2026 08:01:33 GMT
Four years into its full-scale war, Russia is feeling the effectsSteve Rosenberg reports on the economic consequences of Russia's war, and how people are coping. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4gj20xzw39o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4gj20xzw39o#1 Mon, 23 Feb 2026 06:01:59 GMT
